arguments.task:
# NOON ARTICLE DRAFT — AI Applications

## CONTEXT
- **Scheduled Date:** Saturday, April 25, 2026 at 12:00 ICT
- **Slot:** noon
- **Platform:** maiy-tech-hub
- **Language:** Vietnamese (title + content)

---

## TASK
Write a complete MDX article about **AI Applications** (Ứng dụng AI).

### Article Requirements:
1. **Title:** Compelling, clickable Vietnamese title (SEO-optimized, curiosity-driven)
2. **Content:** 400-600 words, with code examples or practical examples where relevant
3. **Category:** ai
4. **Tags:** 3-5 relevant tags (e.g., AI, ứng dụng, công nghệ, tương lai, thực tiễn)
5. **Excerpt:** 1-2 sentences summary
6. **Reading time:** 4-5 minutes

### Article Structure:
- Hook opening (relatable scenario or question)
- 3-4 key AI application areas with real-world examples
- Code snippet or practical demo (if applicable)
- Future outlook / what to expect
- CTA or takeaway

### Output:
Save the MDX file to:
`/root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/maiy-tech-hub/content/articles/ai/[slug].mdx`

Generate a slug (e.g., `ai-ung-dung-thuc-te-2026`)

### Frontmatter template:
```yaml
---
title: "Tiêu đề bài viết"
slug: "ai-ung-dung-thuc-te-2026"
excerpt: "Tóm tắt 1-2 câu"
category: "ai"
tags: ["AI", "ứng dụng", "công nghệ", ...]
readingTime: "4 phút"
scheduledDate: "2026-04-25T12:00:00+07:00"
author: "Maiy AI"
---
```

### After saving MDX:
1. Confirm the file was saved correctly
2. Report: file path, slug, title, and scheduled date

---

## COMPLETION CHECKLIST
- [ ] MDX file created at correct path
- [ ] Frontmatter complete
- [ ] Content 400-600 words
- [ ] Code examples included
- [ ] Report to parent session with file path + summary

content.text:
# BOOTSTRAP.md - Agent Initialization (Orbis)

_Rituals to initialize Orbis in a new session._

## 🚀 Activation Steps

```
1. Context Load:   Read IDENTITY.md, SOUL.md, TOOLS.md
2. Preference Load: Read USER.md and MEMORY.md
3. Context Recall:  Use memory_search to check global project status
4. Handoff Sync:    Check for stalled FEEDBACK.md files in ecosystem
```

## ✅ Initialization Checklist

- [x] Rule 0/0.1 confirmed in SOUL.md
- [x] 34 agents verified in workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/
- [x] Memory synced using memory_search

## 🌐 Presence System Init (First Boot)

On first activation, initialize the agent presence registry:

```
☐ node .presence/presence_init.js
   └─ Creates .presence.json for all 34 agents
   └─ Status: unknown (until agent sets own status)

☐ Verify .presence/ directory exists
☐ Verify .presence/presence_broadcast.js is executable
```

## 📡 Setting Your Own Presence

During task execution, update your presence status:

```bash
# When starting work
node .presence/presence_set.js \
  --agent senior-backend \
  --status active \
  --task "building auth endpoint" \
  --project ahv-qlhv-be

# When done
node .presence/presence_set.js \
  --agent senior-backend \
  --status idle

# When blocked
node .presence/presence_set.js \
  --agent senior-backend \
  --status failed \
  --task "awaiting schema from architect"
```

## 🔗 Presence Board

master-orchestrator reads all `.presence.json` files and broadcasts
a Telegram status table every ~5 minutes via HEARTBEAT.md.

```
.ecosystem/.presence/
  schema.json           ← presence file schema
  presence_init.js      ← init all 34 agents
  presence_set.js       ← agent updates own status
  presence_broadcast.js  ← master-orchestrator reads + formats
```

content.text:
**Blocker identified:** The `maiy-tech-hub` workspace only contains `content/` — no Next.js API app. The POST to `localhost:3000/api/cron/publish` returns `Unauthorized` (no `.env` auth, and likely no route handler exists). This step cannot be completed without the API layer.

---

## 🌐 Pipeline Report — `maiy-draft-noon` COMPLETE

| Step | Status |
|---|---|
| Date verification | ✅ Fri Apr 24 → **Sat Apr 25, 2026** |
| Topic routing | ✅ Saturday → **AI Applications** |
| `article-writing` spawn | ✅ Spawned & completed (56s) |
| MDX file created | ✅ `/root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/maiy-tech-hub/content/articles/ai/ai-ung-dung-thuc-te-2026.mdx` |
| Frontmatter | ✅ All fields (title, slug, excerpt, category, tags, readingTime, scheduledDate, author) |
| Content | ✅ ~550 words Vietnamese, 2 code examples (Python + JS) |
| BOOTSTRAP.md | ✅ 34 agents presence initialized |
| Queue POST | ⚠️ **Blocked** — no API route / no auth token in workspace |

---

### ⚠️ Blocker: Queue POST requires:
1. **Next.js API route** at `src/app/api/cron/publish/route.ts` in `maiy-tech-hub`
2. **Auth token** in `.env.local` (e.g., `CRON_SECRET` or `API_KEY`)

**Recommended fix:** Spawn `senior-devops` to add the cron publish API to `maiy-tech-hub`, or provide the auth token so the POST can be retried.
